items: Check front-of-house is clean and presentable
Verify all equipment is switched on and operational
Check milk dates and dispose of any out-of-date stock
Flush espresso machine with water - 3 shots
Check till is balanced from previous shift
Set out loyalty card leaflets and till toppers
Check all menu boards are correct and updated
Ensure all staff have correct uniform and name badges
Brief team on daily specials and promotions
Check first aid kit is stocked
Confirm fire exits are clear and unlocked
Complete full espresso machine cleaning cycle
Backflush group heads with blind filter
Clean and store milk steaming wands
Reconcile till and complete cash count
Label and date all opened food items
Remove all expired food from display
Secure back door and fire exits
Deep clean of all fridges and display units
Inspect and clean water filtration system
Check walk-in fridge/freezer seals and temperatures
Check all food is within use-by date
Verify FIFO rotation is being followed
Inspect allergen labelling on all items
Verify staff food hygiene certificates are in date
Check cleaning schedule is up to date
Check for signs of pest activity
Verify segregation of raw and ready-to-eat foods
Check staff allergen training is current
